overview: Based on the published agenda, this special meeting of the Wausau School District Board of Education was scheduled to address potential litigation matters in closed session. The board was expected to convene under Wisconsin State Statute 19.85(g), which permits closed sessions for preliminary discussions regarding potential litigation, before potentially reconvening in open session to take any necessary action.

agenda.item: Request for Closed Session Pursuant to State Statutes
Reconvene in Open Session, to take further action if necessary and appropriate

discussions.body: The board was scheduled to enter closed session under Wisconsin State Statute 19.85(g) to conduct preliminary discussions regarding potential litigation facing the district. This statutory provision allows governing bodies to meet privately when discussing matters that could lead to legal action.
Following the closed session discussion, the board was expected to reconvene in open session to take any further action deemed necessary and appropriate based on their closed session deliberations.

publicComment: No public comment period was included on this agenda.
actionItems: Board was expected to potentially take action in open session following closed session discussions regarding potential litigation
title: Special Meeting - 2026-05-18
